Overload.descr: Axis aligned bounding box.
Causes an exception on the current thread with a user defined error
Absolute value of x.
Arc Cosine.
scriptgoal.AddAimRequest() - Adds an aim request.
Adds a bot to the game.
scriptGoal.AddFinishCriteria(subject, expression[, value]) - See the Wiki for the whole explanation.
scriptGoal.AddFinishCriteria(expression[, value]) - See the Wiki for the whole explanation.
mapGoal.AddRoute(string, string, float) - Adds a route to the map goal.
bot.AddScriptGoal(string) - Adds a goal to the bots behavior tree by name. Useful when a script goal has AutoAdd set to false, so you can more explicitly control when a bot gets the goal.

Param.name: string: name of script goal to add to bot behavior tree

Overload.descr: goal.AddUsePoint - adds a usepoint to a goal at Vec3 position.
Util.AddUsePoint - adds a usepoint to a goal at one or more positions.
Util.AddUsePoint - adds a usepoint to a goal at one or more positions.
Util.AddUsePtFromWp - adds a usepoint to a goal at a waypoint position.
Util.AddUseWp - adds a usepoint to a goal at a waypoint position.
Wp.AddWaypoint - adds a waypoint at given position. Returns waypoint ID.
scriptgoal.AddWeaponRequest() - Adds a weapon request.
Server Manager specific function for managing bots vs humans games
Allocates and returns the next available unique serial number for map goals
Computes an Angle from an Axis
Computes the area from three given positions
Arc Sine.
Causes an exception if Condition is not true.
Arc Tangent.
Server Manager specific function for balancing teams
Retrieves the number of records of a given type.
Retrieves all records matching a type from global Blackboard.
Makes a numeric blackboard item key.
Posts a record to the blackboard, keyed to a certain type, and storing arbitrary values.
Prints the global blackboard to the in-game console.
Checks if a record exists for a certain key that matches a given owner id.
Checks if a record exists for a certain key that matches a given target id.
Removes all records of a given type by the given owner id.
Removes all records of a given type by the given target id.
scriptgoal.BlackBoardDelay() - Delays a given MapGoal the given seconds for a bot
scriptGoal.BlackboardIsDelayed(param) - Returns true if the goal has been found on the blackboard.
Halt thread execution until another thread signals one of the block variables.
scriptGoal.BlockForVoiceMacro(?) - ?.
scriptgoal.BlockForWeaponChange() - Waits until the bot has changed to the requested weapon.
scriptGoal.BlockForWeaponFire(?) - ?.
Calculates a projectile trajectory.
bot.CanGrabItem(GameEntity) - Returns true if bot can take item (flag, gold, radar parts, ...).
bot.CanGrabItem(string) - Returns true if bot can take item (flag, gold, radar parts, ...).

Param.name: string: FLAG or FLAG_dropped goal name

Overload.descr: bot.CanSnipe() - It's deprecated and has been replaced by Util.CanBotSnipe(bot) in Enemy Territory.
Returns the smallest integer >= number.
aabb.CenterPoint() - Gets the center of the bounding box.
bot.ChangeClass() - Instructs the bot to change to the given class.

bot.ChangePrimaryWeapon(WEAPON) - Selects a new primary weapon for the bot. Should take effect next spawn. You must not use this function inside map scripts. You should use SetWeaponAvailability if you want to disable some weapons.
bot.ChangeSecondaryWeapon(WEAPON) - Selects a new secondary weapon for the bot. Should take effect next spawn.
bot.ChangeSpawnPoint(int) - Changes the desired spawn point for the bot to respawn at.
bot.ChangeTeam() - Instructs the bot to change to the given team.
Returns true if cheats are enabled.
Wp.CheckBlockable - Checks blockable waypoint flags, to avoid temporary scripting reachability issues.
Checks if the bounds of two given entities intersect.
Forces a number into the specified boundaries.
scriptGoal.ClearFinishCriteria([clearPersistent]) - Deletes finish criteria.
Clears one or more roles of one or more MapGoals.
bot.ClearRoles() - clears the given role(s) from the bot.
mapgoal.ClearRoles() - clears the given role(s) from the mapgoal.
scriptGoal.ClearWatchForMapGoalsInRadius(?) - ?.
file.Close() - closes an open file.
str.Compare() - compares case-sensitive. Returns -1 if the this < compare string, 0 if the strings are equal, 1 otherwise.
str.CompareNoCase() - compares case-insensitive. Returns -1 if the this < compare string, 0 if the strings are equal, 1 otherwise.
Computes a normalized vector.
vec3.Concave(Vec3, Vec3) - ?.
Returns a config parameter value from omni-bot.cfg.
Sets a config parameter value in omni-bot.cfg.
aabb.Contains(Vec3) - Checks if the bounding box contains a point.
goal.CreateGuiFromSchema() - Creates Gui elements for schema properties.
Creates a new goal.
Returns the cross-product of two vectors.
vec3.CrossProduct(Vec3) - ?.
Cause the debugger to break at this point.
Converts degrees to Radians.
scriptGoal.DelayGetPriority(?) - ?.
goal.DeleteIfEntityFlag() - Sets one or more entity flags that will cause the goal to be deleted.

Deletes a trigger region previously created with OnTriggerRegion. Because regions aren't required to have unique names, DeleteTriggerRegion will delete all regions that match the provided name. This allows grouping of different trigger regions by shared names.
Wp.DeleteWaypoint - delete a waypoint from given position. Returns true if successful, false otherwise.
scriptgoal.DidPathFail() - Returns true if path failed, false if not.
scriptgoal.DidPathSucceed() - Returns true if path succeeded, false if not.
bot.DisableBotPush() - Disables pushing on given bot.
Util.DisableGoal - disables one or more goals.

Param.name: [bool: true to exclude routes from being disabled]

Overload.descr: goal.DisableGoal - disables a goal.
goal.DisableIfEntityFlag() - Sets one or more entity flags that will cause the goal to be disabled.
Wp.Disconnect - ?.
vec3.Distance(Vec3) - Distance.
vec3.Distance2(Vec3) - Squared distance.
Returns the distance between two positions, game IDs or entities.
bot.DistanceTo() - returns the distance of the bot from a position, game ID or entity.
vec3.DistanceXY(Vec3) - Squared 2D distance.
Execute the passed script, return the thread ID for the thread executing the script.

Param.name: string: Script to compile and execute
[bool: execute before returning to this thread]

Overload.descr: Returns the dot-product of two vectors.
Draws an axis aligned bounding box.
Draws an arrow from start to end position in a given color for a given duration.
Draws an axis aligned bounding box in a given color for a given duration.
Draws a debug line from start to end position in a given color for a given duration.
Draws an entity's axis-aligned bounding box for a given duration in seconds.
Draws an entity's obstacle bounding box for a given duration in seconds.
Draws a line between two positions in a given color for a given duration.
Draws a radius at a given position in a given color for a given duration.
Draws text at a 3d location.
Draws a projectile trajectory in a given color for a given duration.
bot.DumpBotTable(string) - Dumps a file with the bot's table to a file in the user folder.
Saves debug console, only if debug window is enabled.
Finds new path for bots in teams specified if paths go through waypoint which has dynamic flag.
Echos the contents of a single table.
Prints a message to the screen.
bot.Enable(bool) - Enables/Disables all thinking for the bot.

Param.name: bool: true to enable, false to disable

Overload.descr: Enables the debug window.
bot.EnableShooting(bool) - Enables/Disables all shooting for the bot.

Param.name: bool: true to enable, false to disable

Overload.descr: fileObject.EndOfFile() - Checks if the File Object is at the end of the file. Useful for read operations.
scriptgoal.Enter() - called after a scriptgoal is activated
Checks if a given entity is outside. Added in 0.83
Checks if a given entity is valid.
Kills an entity. Requires cheats to be enabled.
Prints an error message to the game's output console.
Executes a command as if it were a bot console command.
Executes a command as if the game entity executed it in console.
Executes the given script file.
Cause the current thread to terminate immediately.
aabb.Expand(Vec3) - Expands the bounding box to contain a position.
Deletes a file by name. This function is restricted to files under the user folder.
Enumerates over all files in a directory. This function is restricted to files under the user folder. This function will call the provided script function with all files enumerated.
Checks if a file exists by name. This function is restricted to files under the user folder.
fileObject.FileSize() - Gets the file size of the file, in bytes.
Returns the goal closest to local player.
aabb.FindIntersection(AABB) - Gets the AABB overlap of 2 bounding boxes.

Param.name: AABB: bounding box to check intersection with

Overload.descr: bot.FireWeapon() - Fires the current weapon.
Returns the largest integer <= number.
fileObject.Flush() - Flushes the file buffer to disk.
bot.ForceTarget(?) - ?.
scriptGoal.ForkThread(?) - ?.
bot.GetAllAlly(category, class, table) - Fills a table with all known allied entities (from bot's sensory memory) that match a desired criteria.
bot.GetAllEnemy(category, class, table) - Fills a table with all known enemy entities (from bot's sensory memory) that match a desired criteria.
bot.GetAllType(category, class, table) - Fills a table with all known entities (from bot's sensory memory) that match a desired criteria.
aabb.GetAxisLength(string) - Gets the length of an axis of the bounding box.
bot.GetBestWeapon() - Gets a weapon id for the best weapon versus current target or a specific entity.
bot.GetBestWeapon(entity) - Gets a weapon id for the best weapon versus current target or a specific entity.

Param.name: entity: evaluate weapon versus specific target entity

Overload.retVal: int: (1 if the bot can build the entity, 0 if the entity is already built, -1 if the entity is not constructable or has been built by enemy.)
Overload.descr: bot.GetConstructableState(entity) - Check state of a BUILD goal.
bot.GetCurrentAmmo(table) - Gets the primary ammo for the current weapon.
bot.GetCurrentAmmo(table, int) - Gets the ammo information for the current weapon.

Param.name: int: firemode (0 for primary, 1 for secondary ammo)

Overload.descr: bot.GetCurrentAmmo(table, int, WEAPON) - Gets the ammo information for another weapon.

Param.name: int: firemode (0 for primary, 1 for secondary ammo)

Overload.descr: bot.GetCurrentWeapon() - Gets the current weapon id for the bot.

bot.GetCursorHint(table) - When a player is near enough something to get a hint icon, such as for dynamiting, this function can access what hint is showing. Some of these hints may or may not ever show up, they were taken as-is from the ET SDK. See the Wiki for the possible values of 'type'.
Gets the value of a game config variable.
Gets the state of a destructible entity.
timer.GetElapsedTime(?) - ?.
Gets the world position of a specific bone on an entity.
Checks if the entity belongs to one or more entity categories. Returns true if the entity belongs to all provided categories.
Gets the class of a game entity.
Gets current weapon of a player.
Gets the world eye position of a game entity.
Gets the facing of a game entity.
Gets a game entity by its name.
Converts a world position into a local space position of a specified entity.
Gets the name of a game entity.
Converts a local space position into a world space position of a specified entity.
Gets the name of a game entity.
Gets the owner of an entity. Typically used for entities that can be held or carried.
Gets the world position of a game entity.
Gets the team ID of a game entity.
Gets the velocity of a game entity.
Gets the world AABB for an entity.
Gets the world AABB for an entity.
bot.GetEyePosition() - Gets the world position of the bots 'eye'.
Gets the name of the currently running game.
Gets the current state of the game.
Gets the current amount of time remaining in the game round in seconds.
mapGoal.GetGoalState() - Gets the goal state of the map goal.
Gets the current gravity value.
mapGoal.GetGroupName() - Gets the current group this goal is assigned to.
bot.GetHealthPercent() - Gets the bot's current health percentage.

Overload.retVal: string: (goal name, or NULL if the bot doesn't have a high level goal)
Overload.descr: bot.GetHighLevelGoalName() - Gets the bot's current high level goal name.
bot.GetLastTarget() - gets the target the bot had before the current target.
Gets the AABB of the local player. Only valid in listen servers.
Gets the aim position of the local player. Only valid in listen servers.
Gets name of just running console command. It is useful if you use same script for multiple commands.
Gets the entity of the local player. Only valid in listen servers.
Gets the eye position of the local player. Only valid in listen servers.
Gets the facing of the local player. Only valid in listen servers.
Gets the ground position of the local player. Only valid in listen servers.
Gets the position of the local player. Only valid in listen servers.
Gets the map's AABB.

Overload.retVal: string: (goal name or NULL if ROAMING, WatchForProjectile or CovertOps)
Overload.descr: bot.GetMapGoalName() - Gets the bot's current map goal name (for example: BUILD_Tank, DEFEND_depot1, ...).
Gets the name of the map currently running.
bot.GetMG42Info(table) - Gets information about currently mounted MG42 - vector CenterFacing and angles MinHorizontal, MaxHorizontal, MinVertical, MaxVertical.
Gets the name of the mod currently running.
Gets the version of the mod currently running.
bot.GetMostDesiredAmmo(table) - Gets information about the currently most needed ammo. See the Wiki for the output table specs.
bot.GetMountedPlayerOnMG42(ent) - Gets player who is mounting MG42.
mapGoal.GetName() - Gets the name of the map goal.
Gets the nearest target matching the desired criteria, friend or foe.
Gets the nearest target matching the desired criteria, only allies.

bot.GetNearestDestination(positions) - Finds paths from the current bot position to multiple destination positions. Returns index of the destination which has the shortest path. It can depend on navigation flags (e.g. teleports, axis/allied waypoints).
Gets the nearest target matching the desired criteria, only enemies.
mapGoal.GetNumUsePoint() - Gets the number of use points the goal has.
string.GetPath([includeSlash]) - GetPath will return the file path from a path string.
vec3.GetPitch() - ?.
mapGoal.GetRadius() - Gets the radius of the map goal.
mapGoal.GetRange() - Gets the range of the map goal.
bot.GetRandomWeapon() - Gets a random weapon id from the list of weapons the bot currently has.
bot.GetReinforceTime() - Gets the current time left (in seconds) before reinforcements spawn for the bots team.
bot.GetSkills(table) - Gets the current skill values and puts them into the table parameter.
bot.GetStat(string) - Gets a current stat from the bot by name. Valid stat names for ET are kills, deaths and xp.
mapGoal.GetTagName() - Gets the tag name of the map goal. This is usually a mash of the entity name and goal type.
bot.GetTarget() - gets the bot's current target entity.
Gets the current time elapsed in the game in milliseconds.
mapGoal.GetUsePoint() - Gets a use point, by index. If no index provided, returns a random one.
Gets the world velocity of the bot.
vec3.GetYaw() - ?.
Go to Vec3 position/facing.
Go to Vec3 position asynchronously.
bot.HasAmmo() - Checks bot' current weapon ammo.
bot.HasAmmo(WEAPON) - Checks bot' given weapon ammo.
bot.HasAmmo(WEAPON, int) - Checks bot' given weapon ammo, with given needed amount.
Returns true if a bot has any of the passed entity flags. Can take any number of flags as parameters.
Returns true if a bot has all of the passed entity flags. Can take any number of flags as parameters.
Returns true if the bot has a line of sight to the position or entity passed, false if the bot's view is obstructed.
Checks if the bot has a given powerup.
bot.HasRole(role) - Returns true if the bot has the given role.
mapgoal.HasRole(role) - Returns true if the mapgoal has the given role.
Checks if the bot has a current target.
bot.HasWeapon(WEAPON) - Checks if the bot has a specific weapon.
bot.HoldButton - makes a bot hold a button for a given time in seconds.
bot.IgnoreTarget - makes a bot ignore a target for a given time in seconds.
bot.IgnoreTargetForTime - See IgnoreTarget
bot.InFieldOfView - checks whether a position is within the bot's current field of view.
aabb.Intersects(AABB) - Checks if 2 AABBs intersect.

Param.name: AABB: bounding box to check intersection with

Overload.descr: targetInfo.IsA(param) - Returns true if Class is equal to parameter.
mapGoal.IsAvailable(TEAM) - Checks if the map goal is currently available to a certain team.
mapGoal.IsAvailableInitial(TEAM) - Is goal available for team initially (before OnMapLoad is executed).
bot.IsCarryingFlag() - Checks if the bot is carrying objective (flag, gold, documents, radar parts, ...).
mapGoal.IsDisabled() - Gets whether the goal is currently disabled.
bot.IsMG42Repairable(ent) - Returns true if mg42 is damaged and can be repaired.
fileObject.IsOpen() - Checks if the file is currently open. Usually used after a call to Open.

bot.IsStuck() - Checks if the bot considers himself to be stuck. Stuckness is typically defined as an insignificant amount of movement over a short period of time (0.5s). The time can be optionally passed to the function for flexibility.

bot.IsStuck(float) - Checks if the bot considers himself to be stuck. Stuckness is typically defined as an insignificant amount of movement over a short period of time (0.5s). The time can be optionally passed to the function for flexibility.

bot.IsWeaponCharged(WEAPON[, int]) - Checks if a weapon is charged. A charged weapon is one that is capable of being used that might occasionally be unavailable for use due to lack of character 'charge', whether that be a gameplay charge bar, stamina, skill, etc.
aabb.IsZero() - Checks if the AABB has no volume.
scriptGoal.KillThread(?) - ?.
string.Left(count) - returns the left count charaters of the string.
string.Length() - returns the length of a string.
vec3.Length() - returns the length of a Vec3.
vec3.Length2() - returns the squared length of a Vec3.

scriptGoal.LimitToNoClass(CLASS, ...) - This function will only allow the script goal to be created if the owning bot is NOT one of the classes provided. This is much more efficient than checking class in script in common cases where a goal only applies to a certain class of bot.

Param.name: CLASS: any number of class Ids

Overload.descr: Writes a string to the Omni-bot log file.
string.Lower() - Converts a string to lower case.
Util.MapDebugPrint - prints a string if Map.Debug is not false or null.
scriptGoal.MarkInProgress([mapGoal]) - Returns true if an empty slot has been found and marked.
Returns the maximum value of the two parameters.
mapGoal.MaxUsers_InProgress() - Gets the max number of users that can go to the goal.
mapGoal.MaxUsers_InProgress(int) - Sets the max number of users that can go to the goal.
mapGoal.MaxUsers_InUse() - Gets the max number of users that can use the goal after they come to the goal position.
mapGoal.MaxUsers_InUse(int) - Sets the max number of users that can use the goal after they come to the goal position.
string.Mid - returns count characters from the start index.
Returns the minimum value of the two parameters.
bot.MoveTowards(pos) - makes a bot move towards a Vec3 position.
vec3.Normalize() - ?.
Registers a callback function with a trigger.
Creates an AABB trigger region and returns an identifier for it.
Creates a spherical Vec3 trigger region and returns an identifier for it.
file.Open() - opens a file. Returns true if successful, false if failed.
Makes a bot press one or more buttons.
Prints a string to the game console.
Converts radians to degrees.
Returns a random float between min and max.
Returns a random integer between min and max.
Returns a random float between min and max.
Releases the aim request from script goal.
Releases the weapon request from script goal.
bot.ReloadProfile() - Reloads the bots profile. The profile is any script associated with the bots name.
bot.RemoveState(string) - Removes a state from a bots behavior tree by name.

Param.name: string: name of script goal to remove from bot behavior tree

Overload.descr: Renders an AABB for the given amount of seconds.
mapGoal.RenderDefault() - Draws goal name, radius, availability, use points, ExtraDebugText, ...
ReplaceCharsInSet will replace all chars in this that are within the charset with the given int char.

Param.name: string: string of chars to replace

Overload.descr: timer.Reset(?) - ?.
mapGoal.ResetGoalPriorities() - Clears all the current priorities.
bot.ResetStuckTime() - Reset the stuck timer.
string.Reverse - reverses the characters of a string.

Overload.retVal: int: (index of first occurrence, or -1 if the string was not found)
Overload.descr: string.ReverseFind(string) - ReverseFind will find the first occurance of the passed string within this string starting from the right.
string.Right - returns the right count characters of the string.
Returns the characters right of and including the given index.
Rounds a number to the nearest integer.
Makes a bot say something in global chat.
Makes a bot say something in fireteam chat.
Makes a bot say something in team chat.
Makes a bot use given voice message, e.g. bot.SayVoice(VOICE.THANKS).
aabb.Scale(float) - Scales the AABB by some amount in every direction.
bot.ScriptEvent(name, param1, param2, param3) - Sends SCRIPTMSG event.
fileObject.Seek(int) - Seeks the read/write position to a specified offset.

Param.name: int: byte offset to seek to

Overload.descr: Sends a trigger with the given trigger info table.
aabb.Set(Vec3, Vec3) - Initializes the AABB mins and maxs.
string.SetAt(int, char) - Returns string with modified character at offset, or original string if index out of range.
mapGoal.SetAvailable(TEAM, bool) - Sets the map goal available for a certain team. Prefer SetAvailableMapGoals instead.
mapGoal.SetAvailableInitial(TEAM, bool) - Sets goal available for team initially.
mapGoal.SetBounds(AABB) - Sets the bounds for a map goal. This is the local space bounds. It will automatically be transformed to the world position of the map goal.

fireMode.SetBurstRange - This function can be called multiple times in order to set several ranges for burst firing. Whenever the target is within one of the ranges, the bot will use controlled burst fire as set up by this function.
aabb.SetCenter(Vec3) - Translates the bounding box to some position. Usually used to move a local space bounding box to world space.
Sets a game config variable.

bot.SetDebugFlag(DEBUG, bool) - Enables a debug flag for the bot. See the global DEBUG table for available options. Enabling debug flags typically cause various debug visualizations to render in order to help identify whats going on with various systems of the bot.
fireMode.SetDesirabilityRange - This function can be called multiple times to assign a desirability to use the weapon when the target is within a given range of the bot.
mapGoal.SetEntity(ent) - Sets the entity for a map goal. It is usually not needed because most entities are detected automatically.
mapGoal.SetFacing(Vec3) - Sets the facing for a map goal.
Util.SetGoalOffset - moves a map goal by a given offset.
Util.SetGoalPosition - sets the map position of a goal.
Sets the relative priority of a goal.
Sets one or more roles of one or more MapGoals. The last parameter must be true for dynamically created goals (FLAG_dropped, FLAGRETURN, DEFUSE ...).
mapGoal.SetGroupName(string) - Sets the current group this goal is assigned to.
fireMode.SetIgnoreEntFlags(?) - ?.
Sets properties of a map goal.
Util.SetMaxUsers - sets max users in use and in progress for a map goal.
Util.SetMaxUsersInProgress - sets max users heading for a map goal.
Util.SetMaxUsersInUse - sets max users in use for a map goal.
mapGoal.SetPosition(Vec3) - Sets the position for a map goal.
Util.SetPositionGoal - sets position of goal 1 on goal 2.

Param.name: string: name of goal to move
string: name of goal on which to move

Overload.descr: mapGoal.SetRadius(float) - Sets the radius for a map goal.

mapGoal.SetRange(float) - Sets the range for a script based map goal. The QueryGoals functions does not return goals which are out of range. Default range for all goals is 0 which means unlimited. Goals will not be interrupted if the range changes after the bot has activated the goal.
mapGoal.SetRemoveFlag(bool) - Marks the goal for removal.
Util.SetRoleForGoals - sets the given role on the goal(s).
bot.SetRoles(role, ...) - sets the given role(s) on the bot.
mapgoal.SetRoles(role, ...) - sets the given role(s) on the mapgoal.
bot.SetStateEnabled(string, bool) - Enables/Disables a state by name.
fireMode.SetTargetBias - Sets a bias multiplier for a target type. This bias will be multiplied with the desirability when calculating the desirability of a weapon versus a target.
Wp.SetWaypointFlag - sets/deletes a flag on a waypoint.
Wp.SetWaypointName - sets the name of a waypoint.
Wp.SetWaypointProperty - sets a property on a waypoint.

WeaponTable.SetWeaponAvailability - enables or disables specified weapon for class. The weapon parameter can be table. The class parameter can be null to set availability for all classes. note: allied PANZERFAUST is automatically converted to BAZOOKA or LAW in Noquarter or ETnam note: bots select random available weapon every spawn (in limbo)
vec3.SetXYZ(x, y, z) - sets the new value of the Vec3.
Debug Information function. Prints Omni-bot version, revision, and revision date, along with file system paths.
Returns a signed scalar of param. Negative numbers return -1, positive numbers return 1.
Signal an event. Param can be a variable of any type used as signal.
scriptGoal.Signal(?) - ?.
Sine of x.
Stop execution of the thread for period of time in seconds.
string.SpanExcluding(string) - Return this string while characters are not within the passed string.
string.SpanIncluding(string) - Return this string while characters are within the passed string.
Returns the sqare root of a number.
Returns the current state function being executed.
Returns the last state that was set before the current one.
Set execution of this thread to a new state function immediately.
Set a function to call when state is about to change.
scriptGoal.Stop() - Interrupts any active Goto and signals PATH_FAILED.
Returns random number between -1.0 and 1.0.
Run the garbage collector iff the current memory used is greater than the desired memory used. Return 1 if the garbage collector was run, 0 otherwise.
Get the desired hard-limit memory usage in bytes.
Get the desired soft-limit memory usage in bytes.
Return the current memory used in bytes.
Return the number of times full garbage collection has occurred.
Return the number of times incremental garbage collection has occurred.
Return the number of warnings generated because the GC or VM thought that the GC was poorly configured.
Enable or disable automatic adjustment of the memory limit(s) for subsequent garbage collections.
Set the desired hard-limit memory usage in bytes.
Set the desired soft-limit memory usage in bytes. This soft value should be less than the hard value.
System.Time(): Returns a formatted string with current day, date, and time.
Returns the machine time in milliseconds.
Returns the number of elements in a table object.
Returns a copy of a table.
Returns the tangent of x.
bot.TeamLandminesAvailable() - Returns the remaining count of team landmines.
fileObject.Tell() - Returns the current offset of the read/write position in the file.
Create a new thread. Returns a thread identifier that may be used to control or query the thread.
Returns a table of all thread identifiers.
Return the identifier of the current thread.
Kill a thread. If no parameter is present, the current thread will be killed.
Kill all threads, optionally including the current one. Pass true to kill current thread.
Return the time the thread has been running in milliseconds.
System.Time(): Returns a formatted string with current day, date, and time.
Util.TimeFormat(): Returns formatted date/time string.
Converts a number or string to a boolean if possible.
Converts an integer or string to a float if possible.
Converts a float or string to an integer if possible.
Split a string into substrings (tokens) at occurrences of the string passed as parameter.

bot.ToLocalSpace(Vec3) - Converts a vector into local bot space. This results in a position relative to the bots current position and rotation. This function is useful for simplifying some types of logic.
Converts param to a string if possible.
Converts a string to a vector if possible.
bot.ToWorldSpace(Vec3) - Converts a vector from local bot space to world space.
Performs a traceline collision test, and returns the results in a table.
string.TrimLeft() - returns a string trimmed from the left.
string.TrimRight() - returns a string trimmed from the right.
Return the type ID of the variable passed.
Return the type name of the passed variable.
Register an operator for a type. Return 1 on success, otherwise 0.
Register a variable with a type such that (type).varname will return the variable. Return 1 on success, otherwise 0.
Returns random number between 0.0 and 1.0
scriptGoal.UpdateWeaponRequest(?) - ?.
string.Upper() - Converts a string to upper case.
scriptGoal.WatchForMapGoalsInRadius({Radius, Category[, RequireLOS]}) - ?.
fileObject.Write(...) - Writes a value of varying types to the file, in whatever file mode was used to open the file.

Param.name: This function can take any number of parameters, of types integer, float, string, or NewLine;

Overload.descr: Cause current execution to yield control to the virtual machine.
